name: Jeff Coffin
abstract: Jeff Stanley Coffin (born August 5, 1965) is an American saxophonist, composer, and educator. He is a three-time Grammy Award winner as a member of Bela Fleck and the Flecktones, with whom he performed from 1997 until 2010.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Bela Fleck and The Flecktones/ Del McCoury Band
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Derek Brown
about_quotes.evidence: the last one I just had was February 26 with Jeff Coffin, a duo, and it’s just the two of us playing saxophone.
about_quotes.doc_title: Derek Brown interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 5, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Kininger
about_quotes.evidence: now that Jeff Coffin is in the band, who I’ve been friends with
about_quotes.doc_title: Sam Kininger interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 27, 2011

about_quotes.speaker: Diblasio
about_quotes.evidence: If I were to have like Jeff Coffin come in and talk, or I’m thinking of all my friends that I know...
